description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade. The exterior walls are light gray with large, rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light. The front of the house features a small, landscaped area with tall, conical shrubs and a paved entryway. On one side, there is a fenced patio or deck area with additional greenery, suggesting a private outdoor space. The roof is broad and overhangs slightly, emphasizing the contemporary architectural style. The overall design is sleek, geometric, and well-suited for an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large symmetrical windows, and landscaped front and side areas. The design is minimalist and geometric, with a light gray facade and private outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the fenced patio area with tall shrubs and a section of the flat roof.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain back wall and the separation between the two house units.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible windows and the patio area with greenery.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entryway, symmetrical window arrangement, and landscaped front yard with tall shrubs.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a paved path, flanked by tall shrubs and a simple, modern door; no porch or overhang.
